prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic editorial portrait of a confident young Black man in his early 20s with short cropped black hair and smooth skin standing full-body in the center of a dark minimalist studio, facing the camera with a calm serious expression and arms crossed. He wears a fitted black ribbed turtleneck sweater, charcoal tailored trousers, and polished black leather Chelsea boots. The background is a matte black textured wall and dark reflective stone floor, lit with warm dramatic side lighting, soft rim light, shallow depth of field, and subtle golden highlights. Surround him with exactly 30 suspended or foreground objects, frozen in midair as if time has stopped: 6 antique books, 5 gold pocket watches, 4 vintage cameras, 4 dried flower clusters, 4 white folded paper geometric shapes, 3 brass star or compass ornaments, 2 open paper sheets, 1 brown takeaway coffee cup, and 1 brown leather briefcase. Arrange the objects at varied depths around the subject, with some large blurred foreground elements at the bottom left and right, crisp midground objects framing his torso and head, and smaller background objects near the edges. Use a refined gallery-worthy mood, high fashion editorial composition, realistic shadows under every floating item, dust-like atmosphere, black-and-bronze color palette, 85mm lens look, vertical 2:3 aspect ratio, no text, no watermark. The overall theme is frozen time, memory, knowledge, and ambition.
promptEn: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic editorial portrait of a confident young Black man in his early 20s with short cropped black hair and smooth skin standing full-body in the center of a dark minimalist studio, facing the camera with a calm serious expression and arms crossed. He wears a fitted black ribbed turtleneck sweater, charcoal tailored trousers, and polished black leather Chelsea boots. The background is a matte black textured wall and dark reflective stone floor, lit with warm dramatic side lighting, soft rim light, shallow depth of field, and subtle golden highlights. Surround him with exactly 30 suspended or foreground objects, frozen in midair as if time has stopped: 6 antique books, 5 gold pocket watches, 4 vintage cameras, 4 dried flower clusters, 4 white folded paper geometric shapes, 3 brass star or compass ornaments, 2 open paper sheets, 1 brown takeaway coffee cup, and 1 brown leather briefcase. Arrange the objects at varied depths around the subject, with some large blurred foreground elements at the bottom left and right, crisp midground objects framing his torso and head, and smaller background objects near the edges. Use a refined gallery-worthy mood, high fashion editorial composition, realistic shadows under every floating item, dust-like atmosphere, black-and-bronze color palette, 85mm lens look, vertical 2:3 aspect ratio, no text, no watermark. The overall theme is frozen time, memory, knowledge, and ambition.
promptZh: 创作一张超写实的电影感编辑风格肖像，画面中心是一位 20 出头、自信的黑人男性，留着黑色短发，皮肤光滑，全身站立在深色极简主义影棚中央，面朝镜头，表情冷静严肃，双臂交叉。他身穿 修身黑色罗纹高领毛衣、炭灰色定制长裤和抛光黑色皮革切尔西靴。背景为哑光黑色纹理墙面和深色反光石材地面，采用温暖且富有戏剧性的侧光照明，配以柔和的轮廓光、浅景深以及微妙的金色高光。在他周围布置 30 个悬浮或前景物品，仿佛时间静止般悬停在半空中：6 本古董书、5 只金质怀表、4 台复古相机、4 束干花、4 个白色折叠纸质几何图形、3 个黄铜星形或指南针装饰品、2 张展开的纸张、1 个棕色外带咖啡杯和 1 个棕色皮质公文包。将这些物品以不同的深度布置在主体周围，左下角和右下角放置一些模糊的大型前景元素，中景处清晰的物品环绕其躯干和头部，背景边缘处则布置较小的物品。营造出精致的画廊级氛围，采用高级时装编辑构图，每个悬浮物品下方均有写实的阴影，带有尘埃感的氛围，黑金配色，85mm 镜头质感，2:3 竖构图，无文字，无水印。整体主题为 时间凝固、记忆、知识与雄心。
